entries.description: Outbound SMS send → `activities` row "SMS Sent" written by sms-service; visible in the deal's activity panel and in `/notifications`.
Inbound SMS → "SMS Received" activity.
Email sent (manual or stage-action) → "Email Sent" activity.
Email received → "Email Received" activity.
A2P brand approved → "Brand Registration Approved" activity from sms-service.
Phone number purchased (Twilio) → "Phone Number Purchased" activity.
Toky number imported → "Phone Number Imported" activity (verify the message wording for BYOC).
Negative-sentiment deal-loss → activity from deals-actions-service "Deal marked Lost: negative sentiment".
Stage-processing failure (deal-mover) → "Stage Processing Failed: Stage X" activity. (Successful moves are silent — known gap.)
`PUT /v1/activities/:id/read` and `PUT /v1/activities/read/account/:accountID` mark activities read at row + bulk levels.
Activity feed scoped to current account_id only — no cross-tenant leakage.
Add an AI-Call action via `POST /v1/stages/:id/actions/ai-call` with `prompt_template`, `call_script`, `audio_file_link` → row created.
Update via `PUT /v1/stages/:id/actions/ai-call/:action_id` → all three fields persist.
Delete the action → row gone.
Trigger on a deal with a phone number → ai-agent receives the call request; activity records "AI Call triggered".
Empty `prompt_template` at save → friendly validation error (don't trigger AI calls without a script).
Add a BizBuySell action with `bizbuysell_username` → row created.
Update + Delete CRUD verified.
Trigger on a deal → bizbuysell integration receives the request (mock OK on staging).
Add a PandaDoc action with `folder_id` + `template_id` → row created.
Editor lists the user's PandaDoc folders/templates (proxied via cloud-documents-service or PandaDoc client).
Update + Delete CRUD verified.
Trigger on a deal → PandaDoc document created and emailed; activity records the doc ID.
Invalid template_id → action fails gracefully, deal NOT advanced.
Add a Siteforge action with `siteforge_api_key` → row created (key encrypted at rest).
Update + Delete CRUD verified.
Invalid API key at save → verify call rejects with friendly error.
Trigger on a deal → Siteforge receives request; activity records the result.
Add a Voicemail action to a stage via `POST /v1/stages/:id/actions/voicemail` → row created with `audio_file_name` + `audio_file` URL.
Voicemail editor accepts an audio upload (mp3/wav); upload posts to cloud-documents-service; resulting URL is saved to the action.
Update the action via `PUT /v1/stages/:id/actions/voicemail/:action_id` → field changes persist; older audio URL replaced.
Delete the action via `DELETE /v1/stages/:id/actions/:action_id` → row gone; campaign builder reflects removal.
Trigger the stage on a deal → voicemail dispatched (verify in deals-actions-service logs / activity).
Reject upload of wrong file type (e.g. `.exe`, `.txt`) with friendly error.
Reject oversized audio file (e.g. >25 MB) with friendly error.
`/admin/dashboard` renders 5 stat cards (Actions Performed / Hours Saved / Meetings Booked / Revenue Generated / Pending Connections).
Sidebar shows: Billing & Accounting / Dashboard / Pricing / Campaigns / LinkedIn Management / User Settings.
`/admin/billing` redirects to `/admin/billing/clients`.
`/admin/billing/clients` shows revenue cards: Total / Recurring / Non-recurring with currency formatted to 2 decimals (FE-BUG-10 fix — `$11,036.30`).
`/admin/billing/payments` renders payment history.
`/admin/campaigns` redirects to `/admin/campaigns/analytics`.
`/admin/campaigns/analytics` shows campaigns by client.
`/admin/campaigns/templates` lists templates.
`/admin/pricing/plans` lists plans.
`/admin/pricing/plans/create` renders plan create form.
`/admin/pricing/promo-codes` lists promo codes.
`/admin/pricing/addons` lists addons.
`/admin/user-settings` renders user mgmt for account.
`/admin/*` deep route as MEMBER role → 403 or hidden (privilege check).
`/admin/*` direct nav from prod hostname → redirected (regression for FE-BUG-09).
`/admin/pricing/addons` lists add-ons (per-plan + global).
`/admin/pricing/addons/create` requires name + price + scope (plan_id or global).
Create add-on → appears in `GET /v1/subscription-addons` public list.
Update add-on price → reflected on `/settings/manage-plans` for users.
Delete add-on with no active subscribers → row removed; with active subscribers → friendly error.
`/admin/pricing/plans` lists every plan with name, price, billing cycle, addon count.
`/admin/pricing/plans/create` form validates required fields (name, price, currency, cycle).
Submit valid form → `POST /v1/admin/plans` creates plan; appears in list.
Edit existing plan → `PUT /v1/admin/plans/:plan_id` updates; price change reflects on `/v1/plans/:plan_id` public endpoint.
Delete a plan with active subscribers → friendly blocking error (don't orphan subscriptions).
Delete an unused plan → row removed.
`/admin/pricing/promo-codes` lists existing codes with discount + expiry + usage count.
Create a code with 100% discount + future expiry → `GET /v1/promo-codes/:code` returns valid + applies on signup.
Create with past expiry → save succeeds but public lookup returns expired (anti-cheat).
Edit usage cap → reflected at apply time (cap = 1 → second redemption blocked).
Delete an active promo → cleanly removed; in-flight checkouts fall back to no-discount.
Set active hours to 9–5 weekdays from `/settings/general` → `PUT /v1/active-hours/:id` saves.
Stage actions scheduled to fire at 11pm on a Tuesday → deal-mover/deals-actions defer the dispatch until 9am Wednesday.
Saturday at noon (outside weekday window) → action defers to Monday 9am.
`PUT /v1/active-hours-preferences` to globally disable active hours → actions fire immediately regardless of time.
`/automation-campaign/[id]` shows the AI personalization toggle in the workflow header (`EditWorkflowHeader`). Disabled by default on new campaigns.

Toggle ON → opens `AiPersonalizationCostModal` showing cost breakdown + impacted stages + deal count → confirm → flag persists (`PUT /v1/campaigns/:id/ai-personalization/enable`); reload retains the new state.
Toggle OFF → flag flips back; AI cost banner disappears.
Test-Email button on email stage action is **disabled when AI flag is OFF**; **enabled when ON**.

Campaign with `ai_personalization_enabled=true` + non-empty campaign goal + AI offering: trigger a stage email action → deals-actions-service calls PersonalizeIQ → recipient gets a personalized subject + body different from the literal template.
Same campaign but AI flag OFF: stage email action sends the literal template (with merge tags rendered) — NO PersonalizeIQ call.
Campaign with AI flag ON but **empty campaign goal** → stage email action falls back to un-personalized template silently (known gap; user sees no error).
Same with empty AI offering → same fallback.
Stage SMS action with AI flag ON → personalized message body sent; subject is irrelevant for SMS (`Message:` only).

AI personalization is performed BEFORE merge-tag rendering at send time: when AI output happens to contain a literal `{{...}}` string, the downstream rendering pass strips it (silent data loss — known risk).
`generate_ai_variants` switch on email action editor is hidden in production (`!IS_PROD` guard) and on staging it's a UI stub — toggling it has no observable backend effect today.
AI agent `/health` endpoint reports OpenAI connectivity and thread-pool size.
Inbound sentiment scoring runs **regardless of `ai_personalization_enabled`** — confirm by sending an inbound SMS to a campaign with the flag OFF; `messages.sentiment` still updates.
Manual inference heuristics run before OpenAI: send inbound message containing exactly the word "unsubscribe" → sentiment is NEGATIVE within 1-2 seconds (no OpenAI latency).
Heuristics fall through to OpenAI: ambiguous body like "let me think about it" → goes to OpenAI; result comes back within ~75 s worst case (5 retries × 15 s).
AI agent retries OpenAI failure 5 times before giving up → message stays at `sentiment=NONE`. Service does not crash.
`/v1/messages/sentiment-webhook` and `/v1/emails/sentiment-webhook` from outside the cluster — confirm not reachable from public internet (no auth on these routes today).
entries.notes: QA-AUDIT-STALE #32 fixed 2026-04-30: sentiment-webhook lives on sms-service, not ai-agent.

entries.description: Credit balance drops by the AI personalization rate after a personalized email send (charge happens in deals-actions-service / users-service).
Toky send + AI personalization = AI credits charged + phone credits skipped (FE-SMS-TOKY-016 cross-reference).
Cleanup endpoint `POST /v1/cleanup-old-prompts` removes prompt responses older than 24h from MongoDB; healthy DB count after.
entries.notes: QA-AUDIT-STALE #33 fixed 2026-04-30: tests both legacy /cleanup-old-prompts and the QA-FULL-030 /v1/ alias.

entries.description: `/login` page renders with email + password + Forgot Password + Login + Register link.
Login with valid credentials → success toast → redirect to /automation-campaign.
Login with wrong password → friendly error, no stack trace.
Login with non-existent email → generic friendly error (no enumeration).
Login with empty fields → form validation errors.
Eye icon on password field toggles show/hide.
Forgot Password link → /forgot-password page renders.
Submit forgot password form with valid email → success message.
Submit forgot password with non-existent email → generic success (anti-enumeration).
`/auth-reset-password?token=invalid` → friendly invalid token error.
`/auth-reset-password` reset password form validates min length and match.
Sign Out button → clears cookies → redirects to /login.
Hard refresh of authenticated page → session restores, no console errors.
Direct nav to authenticated route while logged out → redirects to /login with `?redirect=` preserved.
JWT expires mid-session → next API call triggers refresh; refresh fail → logout.
Login on staging hits staging BFF (`user-fe-backend.test.revhero.io`), NOT prod (FE-BUG-002 regression test).
Cookie has `Secure`, `HttpOnly`, `SameSite=Lax` flags.
Open redirect — `?redirect=https://evil.com` after login → blocked.
Login button shows loading spinner while authenticating.
Rate limiting on /login (50 rapid attempts) → blocked or warned.
BFF login endpoint rate limiting: Redis-backed fixed-window rate limiter enforces LoginMaxAttemptsPerEmail (10) and LoginMaxAttemptsPerIP (30) limits.
entries.expected: Repeated wrong-password attempts on same email return 429 within 30 attempts; retry_after_seconds in body.data.
entries.notes: Source: ratelimit.go in BFF, integrated into auth.handler.go.

entries.description: BFF rate-limit 429 response carries friendly message + retry_after_seconds, no internals leaked.
BFF rate limit is scoped per-email: budget exhaustion on one email does not affect another.
`/automation-campaign` lists campaigns. Empty state "No Campaign found" when none.
Tabs: Active / Inactive / All Campaigns switch correctly.
Search Campaigns input filters list.
Pagination Next/Prev disabled at boundaries.
PULSE / SWARM tabs at top (SWARM dev-only).
Click "Create campaign" → /automation-campaign/create renders builder.
Campaign builder shows "Building campaign" header + Untitled placeholder (NOT literal "undefined" — FE-BUG-08 fix).
Campaign builder canvas shows "Add Stage +" button.
Click Add Stage opens stage type modal.
Stage settings modal validates required fields.
Edit campaign name pencil opens rename input.
Save Campaign with no stages → friendly error or warning.
Active toggle persists after save.
Click "Import campaign from CRM" → opens import modal.
Import campaign validates CRM connection state.
`/automation-campaign/[id]` for non-existent ID → 404 or friendly error.
`/automation-campaign/[id]/deals` lists campaign deals.
Deals table search works.
Pull CRM State button triggers sync.
Stage drag-and-drop reorders without crashes.
/automation-campaign/[id]/deals/search renders DealsSearchFilter + DealsSearchTable with at least one filter affordance.
Search filter on deals/search updates URL state when typed + submitted (smoke).
Status filter on deals/search applies cleanly without crash (smoke).
Pagination controls on deals/search navigate without crash (smoke).
Header credit-balance widget reflects current balance (`GET /v1/credit`).
Top-up via card → balance increases by purchased amount; transaction recorded.
Send a Twilio SMS → balance decreases by 1 PHONE/SMS_MESSAGE unit.
Twilio API failure → balance returns to original value (release flow).
Send a Toky SMS → balance unchanged (BYOC).
Send a personalized email/SMS via stage action → balance decreases by AI personalization unit (NOT phone).
Failed AI personalization (PersonalizeIQ 5xx) → AI credits not committed; falls back to un-personalized template.
Hit balance = 0 → outbound Twilio send rejected with friendly out-of-credits modal.
Add-on activation increases monthly credit allowance; reflected in `/v1/credit/settings`.
Cancel add-on at end of period → next month's allowance reverts.
Connect Pipedrive via `POST /v1/supported-crms/pipedrive/verify-api-key` with valid token → green badge.
Invalid API key → friendly error, no green badge.
Map Pipedrive user to RevHero account.
Enable CRM sync on a campaign → existing Pipedrive deals pulled into the campaign.
Force-pull from CRM → deal-mover gets new candidates next sweep.
Disable CRM sync → no further auto-pulls; existing deals retained.
Stage move with CRM sync enabled → Pipedrive note + stage update appear within ~30 s.
Pipedrive webhook (deal updated externally) → RevHero deal record updates.
Pipedrive API outage → CRM sync goroutine fails silently; the move still succeeds (graceful degradation).
HubSpot connect flow renders, key validation succeeds (BFF `POST /v1/supported-crms/hubspot/verify-api-key`).
All staging API calls go to `*.test.revhero.io` (FE-BUG-002 regression).
Cloud-document uploads on staging go to `cloud-documents-service.test.revhero.io`.
`/help`, `/dashboard`, `/purchase-lists`, `/linkedin-system`, `/admin` accessible on staging (proxy.ts hostname check).
Same routes redirect to /automation-campaign on prod (regression for FE-BUG-09 + 06 + 07).
Free Plan signup completes without payment form (regression for FE-BUG-001).
Plan-feature labels render numbers with thousands separators (regression for fe-ui-02).
Settings right-rail items don't truncate (regression for fe-ui-01).
Currency values show 2 decimals consistently (regression for FE-BUG-10).
Campaign create header shows "Untitled campaign" (regression for FE-BUG-08).
Phone system /sms doesn't get stuck on skeleton (regression for FE-BUG-04).
Download CSV template via `GET /v1/csv-imports/template` → CSV with the canonical header row.
Upload a valid CSV against an "import stage" via `POST /v1/stages/:id/csv-imports` → import job created with status `pending`.
Upload moves to `processing` → `completed` (poll `GET /v1/csv-imports/:id`); ingested deals appear in the campaign.
Upload a CSV with missing required columns → import fails with a friendly per-row error report.
Upload a CSV with malformed phone numbers → the offending rows are skipped with errors logged; valid rows still ingest.
Upload a CSV with duplicate emails (already exist as deals) → duplicates skipped or merged per dedupe rule; not double-inserted.
Reprocess an existing import via `POST /v1/csv-imports/:id/reprocess` → re-runs the import; idempotent on already-ingested rows.
`GET /v1/stages/:id/csv-imports` lists past import jobs for the stage with their status + counts.
Suppress-import-actions flag on the campaign (`PUT /v1/campaigns/:id/suppress-import-actions/enable`): freshly imported deals do NOT trigger stage actions on the import stage; flag OFF: they do.
Upload an oversized CSV (e.g. 100k rows) → either succeeds with progress feedback, or rejects with a clear size-limit error; no 500 / hung UI.
Lead Ingestion Executor: CSV import completion publishes SubmitLeadIngestionEventV1 to JetStream; deals-actions consumes + submits to external API + records analytics.
Lead-ingestion event contract has SubmitLeadIngestionEventV1 in pkg/revhero_event_bus/contracts (smoke).
Lead-ingestion OAuth2 token acquisition + refresh via leadingestion/auth.go (smoke).
Lead-ingestion analytics row carries success / partial / failed status (smoke).
Manually trigger sweep: `GET https://deal-mover.test.revhero.io/v1/sweeper/run` → 200 with `{"jobs_scheduled":N}`. Run twice in close succession → second call is safe (idempotent at the queue level).

Create a campaign with stages `Stage1 (action) → Wait (3 days) → Stage2 (action)`. Insert a deal with `next_move_date = today` in Stage1. Run sweep → deal moves to Stage2; `next_move_date` becomes `today + 3` (the wait stage delay).
Inactive campaign (`is_active=false`) → sweeper enqueues nothing for that campaign.
Inactive user (per users-service `CheckUsersActiveStatus`) → sweeper skips that user's stages entirely.
Stage with `max_deals_to_move=2` and 5 due deals → only 2 move today; remaining 3 stay with `next_move_date=today` and move tomorrow (counter resets at YearDay boundary).
Worker pops a job from Redis (`dealmover:scheduled_jobs` ZSET) within 5 seconds; transactional `FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` snapshot prevents two workers picking the same deal.
Worker successfully processes job → calls deals-actions-service `POST /v1/actions/trigger` → email-action / sms-action fires → recipient receives the message.
Action executor returns HTTP 425 ("AI scrape pending") for one deal → that deal is rolled back to the prior stage; other deals in the batch still advance.
Action executor returns 5xx → retry counter increments; exponential backoff `2^retry` minutes; after 5 retries → moved to `dealmover:failed_jobs` LIST for manual inspection.
Successful move appears in BFF `GET /v1/deals/filter` with new stage; `entered_stage_at` updated.
Successful move does **NOT** create an activity record (known gap — only failures log activity). Failures DO create one.
CRM sync goroutine fires after move (Pipedrive note + stage update if campaign has CRM connected); sync failures don't block the move.
`/v1/stages/scheduled` debug route returns stages with deals due today; matches the count produced by the sweep.
`/v1/stages/moved` debug route returns stages already processed today.
Redis isolation: write a marker to staging Redis `dealmover:scheduled_jobs` → confirm it is NOT visible in prod Redis (separate hosts since 2026-04-15).
Trigger the sweeper via the super-admin portal button (once issue #22 ships) → response surfaces `jobs_scheduled` in a toast.
Halt a single deal by setting `next_move_date=NULL` directly in DB → sweeper does NOT pick it up, even with `is_active=true`.
Type an email into the Search Deals input → after debounce, the table filters to deals whose contact email contains the substring.
Type a partial first name → table filters by `person_name` substring.
Press Enter in the search input → submits without a full page reload.
Clear the input → full deal list returns; result count updates.
Search input persists across pagination (page 2 keeps the same filter).
`Include lost deals` toggle ON → lost deals appear; OFF → they're hidden. Toggle state survives a search query change.
Signup → Onboarding → First Campaign → First Deal Email Sent

Inbound reply → AI sentiment NEGATIVE → Deal auto-marked Lost :: 1. Recipient of FE-E2E-001 replies "not interested, please remove me". / 2. Pub/Sub webhook delivers the message to email-ingress. / 3. Sentiment is dispatched async to ai-agent → manual heuristic returns NEGATIVE.
Toky BYOC end-to-end SMS round-trip :: 1. Add Toky carrier credential. / 2. Import the test number `+18137719803`. / 3. Send personalized SMS to `+19543041414` from a stage action with AI on.

Multi-stage campaign with wait + actions :: 1. Build campaign: Stage1 (email) → Wait 1 day → Stage2 (sms) → Wait 1 day → Stage3 (email). / 2. Insert deal with `next_move_date=today` in Stage1. / 3. Day 0: trigger sweep → email sent → `next_move_date=today+1`.
Quota cap respected
Inactive user pause-billing edge case
Free-plan user can use SMS via Toky (BYOC) but cannot via Twilio (no credits)
JWT expiry mid-flow
Multi-tenant isolation
Webhook-only services not exposed
`/email-system/email` lists messages or empty state.
"Mailbox not connected" empty state with Connect Mailbox CTA.
Connect Mailbox button opens OAuth flow.
Email filters (All / All Emails / Select an option) work.
Search Emails input filters list.
Click `+` button → opens compose / add modal.
`/email-system/email/add` page renders compose form.
Compose form requires recipient + subject + body.
Send email triggers BFF call and shows success toast.
`/email-system/email/[id]` shows email detail.
Email categories sidebar (Inbox / Star / Sent / Archive) navigates correctly.
Pagination at top right (X of Y) updates with results.
Reply to a sent campaign email from the recipient's external inbox → within ~30 s the reply appears in the FE thread for the deal (Pub/Sub push path).
Same reply: `email` row in DB has `sentiment != ''` after sentiment scorer completes (POSITIVE / NEGATIVE / NEUTRAL).
Send an inbound email containing the word "unsubscribe" → manual heuristic infers NEGATIVE (no OpenAI call); deal moves to LOST status; deal timeline shows the "negative sentiment" entry.
Send an inbound email containing OOO autoresponder text with date "back on May 15" → AI agent extracts date via OOO_RESUMPTION_DATE_EXTRACTION; sentiment = NEUTRAL; deal NOT marked Lost.
Self-reply (sender = same mailbox owner) → sentiment dispatch is **skipped** by `email.helper.go`; sentiment stays empty.
Reply with literal "<script>alert(xss)</script>" subject → FE renders escaped, no JS executes.
Bounce notification (DSN) inbound → bounce_detector flags the original send as bounced; recipient address marked unverified or sending paused.

`POST /v1/emails/sentiment-webhook` directly from outside the cluster (network test) — should be unreachable from the public internet. **If reachable, this is a CRITICAL security finding** (today the route has no auth — see `architecture_dataflow.md`).
Mark inbound email as Read / Unread / Favourite / Archive via FE buttons → state persists across reload.
Conversation history endpoint merges sent + received in chronological order with no duplicates.
Inbound email with `deal_id` resolved to deal owned by another tenant → recipient mailbox owner sees it (their own data); other tenant's UI does NOT.
Email bounce-webhook endpoint requires INTERNAL_SERVICES_WEBHOOK_SECRET — rejects unauth'd requests with 401/403.
Email bounce debounce: duplicate bounces for same recipient within window absorbed without crash (smoke).
Bounced address propagates to email_blocklist after debounce window settles (smoke).

Connect Gmail mailbox via OAuth from `/email-system/email/add` → BFF `PUT /v1/user/oauth/google/url` returns provider URL → consent flow → mailbox row created in email-ingress with `IsConnected=true`, `RefreshToken` populated.
Connect Microsoft mailbox same flow (separate OAuth client).
Disconnect mailbox via `POST /v1/user-mailboxes/:id/disconnect` → row soft-deleted or `IsConnected=false`; subsequent send attempts surface a friendly "mailbox not connected" error in the FE.

From a campaign's email stage-action editor, click "Test Email" → BFF `POST /v1/emails/test-send` (rate-limited 5/hr) → email lands in caller's own inbox with subject prefixed `[TEST]`. Recipient field is locked server-side; FE has no recipient input.
Test-Email button is **disabled when campaign `ai_personalization_enabled === false`** (matches `CreateEmail.tsx:82-83`). Re-enable when toggling the campaign flag on.
Send 6 test emails within 1 hour from the same user → 6th returns 429 with friendly retry message; 7th after the hour resets succeeds.
Send a manual email from `/email-system/email/add` composer with merge tags `{{first_name}}` / `{{company_name}}` to a known deal → recipient receives the rendered text (no raw `{{...}}`).
Send manual email when the recipient is a deal contact → `sent_email` row has `deal_id` populated and the message appears in `GET /v1/emails/deal/:deal_id/conversation-history`.
Email signature configured in `/settings/general` → AI Customized Templates is appended to outbound (verify on receipt; HTML wrapper from `email-composer.tsx`).
Send empty subject → form validation rejects.
Send extremely long body (>50 KB) → either succeeds clean or hits a friendly limit error, never a 500.
Submit XSS payload in subject + body (`<script>alert(1)</script>`) → recipient HTML view escapes (no execution); plain-text view shows literal characters.
POST /v1/templates/render on email-ingress is registered (not 404). Internal service-to-service endpoint consumed by deals-actions AI personalization.
entries.notes: Audit cycle 1 (#30) opened this against /v1/emails/render — wrong path + wrong host. Corrected 2026-05-01 to email-ingress /v1/templates/render with the real DTO {deal_id, parent_user_id, texts}. See routing.go:156 + email.handler.go:898.

entries.description: /v1/templates/render handles invalid deal_id without panicking. 500 is allowed today (known follow-up to map deal-not-found to 404 in email-ingress).
entries.notes: Email-ingress RenderForDeal currently returns 500 on validation/lookup errors. Test accepts 4xx OR 500 today; tighten once email-ingress maps not-found to 404.

entries.description: /v1/templates/render with missing required `texts` field returns 400 from gin's binding layer.
`/help` Help Center renders with FAQ section (dev-only).
Search articles input filters FAQ.
Help category cards (Getting Started / Account & Billing / Using Revhero) render.
Contact Support button opens email/chat.
`/getting-started` checklist progress bar updates as steps complete.
Watch Video button opens video modal.
Add Signature redirects to email signature settings.
Start Guided Walkthrough triggers tour.
Sidebar visible on every authenticated dashboard page.
Sidebar shows: Dashboard / Campaign Builder / Phone / Email / LinkedIn / Buy Leads / Help / Settings (Dashboard, LinkedIn, Buy Leads, Help dev-only).
Header shows credit balance, notification bell, sign out.
Active sidebar item highlighted in primary color.
Click sidebar item navigates without full page reload.
Mobile nav (<768px) collapses sidebar to hamburger.
Layout no CLS when notifications appear/dismiss.
Layout no CLS when modals open/close.
`/user` Change Password modal — submit with wrong current password → friendly error, NOT 500.
`/user` Change Password — new password = old password → blocked with friendly validation.
`/user` Change Password — new password meets policy → success toast → next login uses new password.
Driver License upload from `/settings/general` (BFF `PUT /v1/user/driver-license`) — accepts JPG/PNG/PDF; rejects others with friendly error.
Driver License upload — file >5 MB → rejected with friendly limit message.
Driver License — `GET /v1/user/driver-license` returns the previously uploaded file; expired sessions return 401, not the file.
Payment method add — invalid card number → Stripe (or gateway) error surfaces in a friendly inline message.
Payment method delete (when only one exists) → friendly blocker telling the user to add another first.
Set default payment method from a list of multiple → `PUT /v1/user/payment-methods/:id/default` updates; other methods remain available.
AI Customized Templates editor (in `/settings/general`) — create a template, save, use as merge content elsewhere → template renders in send.
`/notifications` renders list with All / Read / Unread tabs.
Tabs filter notifications correctly.
Sub-tabs Email / SMS / LinkedIn / System filter by type.
"Mark all as read" link clears all unread.
Per-row "Mark as Read" updates individual row.
Notifications scoped to current account_id only (no cross-tenant leak — fe-data-01).
Bell icon in header shows unread count badge.
Relative timestamps update correctly.
`/automation-campaign` loads <5s on staging.
`/dashboard` LCP <2.5s.
`/email-system/email` loads <5s.
`/phone-system/sms` loads <5s.
`/notifications` loads <5s.
`/settings/general` loads <5s.
`/admin/dashboard` loads <5s.
axe-core on `/automation-campaign` — zero serious violations.
axe-core on `/settings/general` — zero serious violations.
Form inputs have associated `<label>` tags.
Color contrast on inactive buttons meets WCAG AA 3:1.
Tab order through forms is logical.
Images have alt text.
Page titles match content.
No 404s on static assets.
`/phone-system` redirects to `/phone-system/sms`.
`/phone-system/sms` renders proper empty state when no phone numbers (FE-BUG-04 fix — no permanent skeleton).
Empty state shows "Go to Phone System Settings" CTA.
`/phone-system/voicemails` lists voicemails or empty state.
Brand registration flow accessible from phone system.
A2P status badge displays correct color/text per status.
Phone Number purchase flow renders available numbers.
Buy phone number button triggers purchase API call.
Send SMS modal validates recipient + body.
`/purchase-lists` renders list (dev-only — visible on staging via proxy fix).
Search by Name filters list.
Status badges (In Progress / Success) render with correct colors.
Download Leads icon enabled only for Success status.
`/purchase-lists/create` renders create form.
Create requires name + filters.
Pagination Rows per page selector works.
Targeting Information eye icon opens detail modal.
`/signup` step 1 renders register form (name, email, password, phone, etc.).
Submit empty form → field validation errors.
Submit with invalid email format → validation error.
Submit with weak password → strength meter + rejection.
Submit with duplicate email → friendly "email already registered".
Submit valid form → advances to step 2 (Select Plan).
Step 2 shows Pulse Free + Pulse Pro side-by-side.
Toggle Monthly ↔ Annually switches all plan prices and shows discount.
Click Free Plan → advances directly to step 4 (Order Information), skipping step 3.
Click Pulse Pro → advances to step 3 (Add-ons).
Step 4 (Free Plan) — Total Due $0.00, "Continue" button (NOT "Continue to Payment").
Step 4 (Free Plan) — promo code field hidden (FE-BUG-001 fix).
Step 4 (Free Plan) — clicking Continue skips payment form and completes signup.
Step 4 (Paid plan) — Payment Information form shows card fields.
Step 4 — apply promo code BETAOFFER → 100% discount → button label changes to "Continue".
Step 4 — invalid promo code → friendly error.
Step 4 — expired promo code → friendly error.
Step 4 — payment form rejects invalid card number.
Step 4 — payment form rejects expired card.
Step 4 — payment form requires all billing address fields.
Browser back button mid-wizard preserves form state.
Direct nav to ?step=4 without completing 1-3 → redirects to step 1 or login.
Already-authenticated user navigating to /signup step=1 → redirects to dashboard.
Wizard step indicator updates correctly per step.
Login as MEMBER (non-admin) credentials from `test-credentials.md` → land on dashboard.
MEMBER attempts to navigate to `/admin/dashboard` → redirected or shown 403 (not blank, not crash).
MEMBER attempts `PUT /v1/admin/plans/:plan_id` directly via curl-equivalent → 403, not 200.
MEMBER can view campaigns and deals owned by their account but NOT another sub-user in the same parent_user.
MEMBER cannot create campaigns or invite seats; admin-only actions are hidden from the UI.
MEMBER can edit their own user profile (`/user`) but not delete the account.
`/settings/general` Sub-User Management → Invite form requires valid email + role selection.
Submit invite → seat row created in pending state; invitation email sent.
Recipient receives email with `/invite/[id]` link.
`/invite/[id]` page shows account name + inviter name + Accept button (no auth required for the GET).
Accept the invite from a brand-new email → account creation + role assignment in one step → land on dashboard with the right account context.
Reuse an already-accepted invite link → friendly "already accepted" message, not a duplicate seat.
Use an expired invite → friendly expired-link message; CTA to ask for a new invite.
Admin revokes a seat from `/settings/general` → MEMBER's session is invalidated within their next BFF call.
Seat count increments `GET /v1/user/seats`; respects plan seat cap (creating a new invite past cap → friendly upsell error).
Direct API call to BFF without token → 401.
Manipulated JWT → server rejects with 401, FE redirects to login.
XSS via campaign name → escaped on render.
XSS via email signature → escaped.
XSS via business profile description → escaped.
SQL injection via search inputs → safe (Prisma parameterized).
Direct nav to /admin/* as non-admin → blocked.
IDOR — change `/automation-campaign/[id]` to another user's id → 403/404.
IDOR — `/admin/billing/clients/[id]` for foreign id → 403/404.
File upload — wrong type rejected.
File upload — oversized file rejected with friendly error.
File upload uses staging cloud-documents URL on staging (regression for FE-BUG-002).
CSP blocks third-party scripts not in allowlist.
Frames-ancestors blocks iframe embedding.
Logout invalidates session token on backend (call BFF after logout → 401).
`/settings/general` renders Billing section by default.
Right sidebar nav items show full text (NOT truncated — fe-ui-01 fix).
Right sidebar nav: CRM API / Billing / Sub-User Management / Active Hours / Email Signatures / Book Link / AI Customized Templates.
Switching nav items updates main panel without page reload.
Current Plan card shows plan name + price (NOT 0/month if user has paid plan).
Plan features show numbers with thousands separators ("50,000 email included" — fe-ui-02 fix).
Promo code card shows discount + expiry + COPY button.
Manage Add-ons button → opens manage-plans page.
CRM API tab shows connected CRM with key (masked).
Sub-User Management lists invited users.
Sub-User Invite form validates email.
Active Hours tab allows setting weekly schedule.
Email Signatures tab renders editor + preview.
Book Link tab persists URL.
AI Customized Templates tab lists templates.
/settings/general AI Chat Response tab renders.
entries.expected: Click 'AI Chat Response' on right-rail nav reveals the panel without crash.

entries.description: Selecting a campaign on AI Chat Response tab reveals channel toggles (smoke).
AI Chat config persists in LocalStorage across page reload (LocalStorage-backed by aiChatResponseStorage.ts).
`/settings/manage-plans` renders Manage add-ons section.
Existing add-ons list shows current subscription add-ons.
Empty state "No active add-ons found" friendly message.
Available add-ons list shows add-ons compatible with current plan.
Add new add-on triggers checkout flow.
Cancel add-on triggers confirmation modal then API call.
`/settings/system` renders Brand Status + Phone Settings.
Right sidebar Phone Settings / Email Settings.
Brand Status badge color matches status.
Register Brand button opens brand registration modal.
Phone Number Settings shows "No Phone Number Purchased" empty state.
Email Settings shows OAuth connection state.
Save Route button persists route preferences.
`/setup` page renders for newly-signed-up users.
Setup wizard captures business profile info.
Skip onboarding via "Skip for now" → dashboard with welcome modal.
`/getting-started` shows 3-step checklist (Watch Intro, Set Email Signature, Create First Campaign).
Welcome modal "Hello {firstName}" greets correct user name.
Setup completion advances `setup_finished` flag in DB.
`/getting-started` is accessible even before `setup_finished=true` (onboarding route exception).
Save email signature in `/settings/general` → reload retains signature; `GET /v1/user/email-signature` matches.
Send an outbound email (manual or stage-action) → recipient sees the signature appended below the body.
Save booking link URL in `/settings/general` → `GET /v1/user/booking-link` matches.
Send a stage email/SMS containing `{{sender_booking_link}}` merge tag → recipient receives the link expanded to the saved URL (validates the new template variable shipped 2026-04-29).
Empty signature configured → outbound email has no trailing artifact (no extra hr/divider with empty content).
Navigate to `/settings/system` → Phone Settings → BYOC card → click "Add Custom Carrier" → modal lists Toky as enabled (others greyed/coming soon).
Save bogus Toky API key → red error toast `"Invalid Toky API key"` (driven by VerifyAPIKey returning 401).

Save the real test API key (`2ca9ccb31175d7bec49cfc1f1c1d269db42c37998b1dc507af30bac2ea433d6e`) → green "Connected" pill; `carrier_credentials` row created with `verified=true`, `verified_at` set, AES-encrypted `api_key_encrypted` populated.
Save handshake registers a webhook on Toky's side: `pkg/toky/client.ListWebhooks` should return a `new_sms` hook pointing at our staging webhook URL (HTTP Basic auth set).
Re-save the same Toky credential → handshake clears existing webhook auth (DeleteWebhookAuth) before re-setting; no orphan basic-auth entries on user's Toky account.
"Add Toky Number" → modal lists user's Toky inventory via `GET /v1/sms/carriers/credentials/:id/numbers`. Unimported numbers are selectable; already-imported numbers are marked.
Import the test number `+18137719803` and assign to a test account → `phonenumbers` row with `provider='toky'`, `twilio_sid=NULL`, `twilio_subaccount_id=NULL`.

Get user's credit balance → send an SMS from the imported Toky number to `+19543041414` → message delivered, recipient receives → user's credit balance is **unchanged** (Toky path skips credit reserve/commit).
Reply from the test recipient `+19543041414` → inbound SMS lands in the FE thread within ~10 s; `messages` row has `direction=inbound`, `external_id` formatted as `toky:<phoneID>:<sha256>`.
Toky inbound webhook validates HTTP Basic auth: send a webhook with no auth header → 401; with wrong password → 401; with correct creds → 200 + persisted message.
Toky inbound webhook payload arrives as a JSON **array** (Toky's documented shape) → service correctly takes element 0; second element (if present) is logged but ignored.
Inbound Toky SMS with negative sentiment → deal marked LOST exactly like Twilio path (verifies the shared `IngressInboundMessage` helper).
Idempotency — replay the same Toky inbound payload twice → only one `messages` row (idempotency key = sha256(from|date|body)).

Disconnect the Toky credential → DELETE flow revokes the remote webhook + clears webhook auth on Toky's side; `carrier_credentials` soft-deleted; subsequent SMS sends from imported Toky numbers fail with friendly 4xx (carrier-not-found).
A user with both a Twilio number and a Toky number sees both in `/settings/system` Phone Numbers list; sending from each routes correctly (provider branching at `message.service.go:161`).

AI personalization with Toky: campaign with `ai_personalization_enabled=true` triggers a stage email/SMS action that uses a Toky number → AI personalization credits **are** charged (PersonalizeIQ); SMS credits are NOT.

Twilio regression — after enabling Toky, sending an SMS from an existing Twilio number still reserves+commits credits as before. (Critical sanity check; the BFF SendSMS double-marshalling bug from PR #31 had affected both paths.)
Confirm `phonenumbers` table tolerates the legacy default: rows pre-2026-04-27 with `provider=NULL` or empty string are treated as `'twilio'` and continue to work.
Save Toky credential with an API key for an account that has zero SMS-enabled numbers → save succeeds, but "Add Toky Number" modal shows empty inventory with a clear empty state.

Toky's `GET /webhooks` returns the DRF-paginated `{count, next, results}` shape — verify our dedup logic in `ensureWebhookRegistered` correctly sees existing webhooks (otherwise saves fail with "Webhook for the same event and with the same URL already exists").
A2P brand registration starts from `/settings/system` → `POST /v1/a2p/register` → status badge transitions through Pending → Approved (Twilio sandbox / mock).
Phone-number purchase blocked when A2P status != `brand_approved` → friendly error surfaces in FE.
Phone-number purchase succeeds when A2P approved → row in `phonenumbers` with `provider='twilio'`, `twilio_sid` set.
Send SMS from `/phone-system/sms` to a test recipient → recipient receives within ~10 s; `messages` row has `direction=outbound`, status=delivered.
Send SMS with merge tag `{{first_name}}` linked to a deal → rendered correctly.
Send SMS exhausts user's PHONE/SMS_MESSAGE credit balance → 402 / friendly "out of credits" toast; no Twilio API call made.
Twilio API failure mid-send → `messages` row has `status=failed` + `error_message`; reserved credits are **released** (verified via users-service balance returns to original).
Send SMS exceeds rate limit (`max_messages_per_hour` = 100 default) → 429 / friendly throttle message.
Inbound SMS from test recipient → appears in FE thread within ~10 s; sentiment column updates async.
Inbound SMS with negative sentiment ("not interested", "stop", "unsubscribe") → deal marked LOST; deal-loss activity logged.
Twilio webhook with wrong `bears_key` → 401; no `messages` row created.
entries.notes: QA-AUDIT-STALE #31 fixed 2026-04-30: corrected URL from /webhook/twilio/incoming to /webhook/incoming.

entries.description: Twilio status callback updates `messages.status` from `queued` → `sent` → `delivered`.
`/user` renders profile fields (Name, Role, Email, Created).
Created date renders correctly (NOT "Invalid Date").
Change Password button opens password modal.
Password modal validates current + new + confirm.
Wrong current password → friendly error.
Password change success closes modal + shows toast.
`/phone-system/voicemails` lists voicemail records or shows empty state.
Each row shows recipient + duration + status + timestamp.
Row "Play" affordance plays the audio inline.
Filter by status (delivered / failed) works.
Pagination works at boundaries.
Voicemail audio URL is signed/scoped — direct hit from logged-out browser → 401/403, not 200 with the file.
